description: REQ-TAG-012 describes the 'すべて解除' (Clear All) button as 'Ubiquitous' — THE SYSTEM SHALL display it. The implementation (TagFilterSidebar.svelte:50-58) only renders the clear button when `hasActive` is true (activeFilterTags.length > 0). This contradicts the spec's ubiquitous requirement. The DOM test (line 283) expects the button when tags exist regardless of active state.

resolution.resolutionNotes: Render guard switched from `hasActive` to `hasTags` so the 'すべて解除' button is shown ubiquitously while a non-empty tag inventory exists, matching REQ-TAG-012. data-testid renamed to 'tag-filter-clear-all' as part of the same coherence pass (see FIND-007 resolution).
